mapper.select: SELECT p.*, s.name AS supplier_name FROM purchases p LEFT JOIN suppliers s ON p.supplier_id = s.id ORDER BY p.purchase_date DESC, p.id DESC
SELECT p.*, s.name AS supplier_name FROM purchases p LEFT JOIN suppliers s ON p.supplier_id = s.id WHERE p.id = #{id}
SELECT pi.*, eq.name AS quality_name FROM purchase_items pi LEFT JOIN egg_qualities eq ON pi.quality_id = eq.id WHERE pi.purchase_id = #{purchaseId}
